name: backend-service-test-happy-path
task: Write tests for the pricing domain router. Test that get_price_chart returns OHLC data with the correct fields and that get_quote returns a valid quote object with ticker, last price, and change percentage.
assertions: Test file is created at electron/__tests__/pricing.test.ts (not in frontend/)
Tests use describe/it blocks with Vitest (import from 'vitest'), not Jest globals
External HTTP calls to Polygon API are mocked using vi.mock() or vi.fn(), not making real network requests
At least one test asserts specific field names in the response (e.g., open, high, low, close, volume)
Each test has at least one meaningful expect() assertion — no tests that only check for truthiness or existence
